rationale: Fresh validation passes for TASK-092. Oversized builds and roadmap docs were condensed while preserving build lifecycle, traceability, task-boundary, sprint, retention, closure, and generated-view semantics. Rebuilt graph reports green health with zero lint warnings, generated parity passes, and npm test passes. Policy blocks implementation validation until source_planning_build are recorded.

issues.summary: changed audit warns generated graph/TASK-092 views are changed; expected for generated state refresh before commit.
Earlier implementation block exists because initial validation omitted dirty content proof; this pass supersedes it.
Implementation build is not commit-ready: source_planning_build.

blocking_questions: Update the implementation build with commit-ready title, body, trailers, checks, validation placeholder, closure brief, and file evidence before validation can pass.

audit_requirement.reason: Gateway profiles require deterministic audit evidence for their build or boundary context.
